description: Single source of truth for all AI matching behavior. Replicated to every console via PouchDB/CouchDB. Both the offline rules engine and the online LLM read from this doc, so they never drift. Edit here, applies everywhere, no redeploy.

adjacency._note: Adjacent age bands earn partial age credit. Same band = full age weight; adjacent = half (engine rounds down).

cluster._note: Mode C HOTSPOT: a zone with >= minOpenCases open cases within radiusMeters of a Traffic-choke-point = HIGH danger. When clusters tie, prefer the nearest chokepoint with higher risk_level (see riskPriority). Surfaced top-5 for the ICCC map.

escalation._note: Auto-flag for police: child < childAgeMax separated > childHours; UNRESOLVED case older than unresolvedHours; >= dupReports matching the same found person (trafficking concern).

returnRules._note: Never return a match below minReturnScore. Modes A/B return topN; Mode C returns topNHotspots.

llm._note: Swappable. Set backend to 'local' in future to route the same calls through an on-box LLM with zero other changes. When unreachable (offline), the rules engine scores everything except the 'description' (semantic) points and tags them 'semantic pending'.

matching._note: Lost/Found cross-type matching. Mode A (lost) searches report_type='found' records; Mode B (found) searches report_type='lost' records. The filter is self-gating: it only applies when at least one record carries a report_type (so the CSV-backed CLI and accuracy harness keep working), and records without report_type are treated as 'lost'. Set crossType:false to search all records (legacy).

voice._note: Turn-based voice intake (online-only enhancement). LISTEN: Sarvam AI Speech-to-Text (voice.stt.model, e.g. saarika:v2.5 or saaras:v3) with languageCode 'unknown' auto-detects across Indian languages and handles a panicked family's Hindi/Marathi/English code-switching; it returns the detected language so the reply matches it. (For heavy code-mixing set stt.model 'saaras:v3' + stt.mode 'codemix'.) THINK: Claude via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (voice.think.model) with the submit_case tool. SPEAK: Sarvam AI Text-to-Speech (voice.tts.model bulbul:v2/v3, speaker) — target_language_code is the language detected at STT, so the agent speaks the FAMILY'S OWN language; returns base64 WAV played directly. STT+TTS use SARVAM_API_KEY, think uses ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Structured submit_case output feeds the deterministic engine. Prompt + schema live in config:voiceAgent. Offline → typed form + Whisper.cpp box.
